title: mongodb-memory-server npm Package
permitted_uses: Planning source for local MongoDB integration tests, repository contract tests, and local-only development dependency posture.
claims_supported: The package provides a MongoDB server for testing and is MIT licensed.
The main package downloads a mongod binary into a cache directory during package install.
The package has a mongodb-memory-server-core dependency that can be configured separately from the default package.
claims_not_supported: That mongodb-memory-server is appropriate for production database hosting.
That it removes the need for production MongoDB index and persistence testing.
That it can be used fully offline before the mongod binary has been cached.
